scripts.setup: npm install --prefix aiChatNode && npm install --prefix aiChatFront
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm --prefix aiChatNode run start:dev" "npm --prefix aiChatFront run dev:web"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n backend,electron -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix aiChatNode run start:dev" "npm --prefix aiChatFront run dev:electron"
